---
title: "Command Architecture Roadmap"
---

> **See also:** [Inter-Widget Communication Roadmap — Ownership & Registration Best Practices](../../inter_widget_communication_roadmap.md#ownership--registration-best-practices) for guidance on where Commands vs ContextActions should be defined as operations scale.

## Progress Summary

*Last updated: 2026-06-16*

| Phase | Status | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| **Phase 1:** Command Foundation | **Complete** | 10 core commands, factory/registry, validation, variable substitution, recorder, mutation guard, golden traces |
| **Phase 2:** Triage Session | **Complete** | Core, widget, guided editor, unit tests |
| **Phase 3:** Persistence & Save Registry | **Complete** | SaverRegistry, 8 savers (CSV ×6, CapnProto, OpenCV), SaveData + LoadData commands, round-trip fuzz tests |
| **Phase 3.5:** Command Recording & Test Generation | **Nearly Complete** | Infrastructure done (3.5.1–3.5.3). Integration testing tracked in [#288](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/288). |
| **Phase 4:** Action Journal Integration | Not Started | Generalizes CommandRecorder into persistent, timestamped journal. Depends on Phase 3.5. |
| **Phase 5:** Undo/Redo | Not Started | CommandStack, memento-based EditorState undo, inverse commands |
| **Phase 7:** Command Registration API | **Complete** | `CommandRegistry` singleton, `register_core_commands()`, explicit dispatcher. All exit criteria met. |
| **Batch & sequence tooling** | **Complete** | `DataManagerPipelineRunner`, `JsonPipelineRunner`, `CommandLog_Widget`, Triage guided editor |
| **Widget Command-ification** | Ongoing | [#289](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/289)–[#292](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/292) filed; widget refactors remain. |

For the full architectural design, types, and code examples, see the
[Command Architecture Design Document](index.qmd).

## What Exists Today

### Registered Commands (11)

| Command | Library | Category | Undoable | Description |
|---------|---------|----------|----------|-------------|
| `MoveByTimeRange` | Commands | data_mutation | Yes | Move entities in a frame range between same-type data objects |
| `CopyByTimeRange` | Commands | data_mutation | No | Copy entities (source unmodified) |
| `AddInterval` | Commands | data_mutation | No | Append interval to `DigitalIntervalSeries`; creates series if missing |
| `SetEventAtTime` | Commands | data_mutation | No | Set or clear `DigitalIntervalSeries` membership at one frame |
| `FlipEventAtTime` | Commands | data_mutation | No | Toggle `DigitalIntervalSeries` membership at one frame |
| `ClearLineDataAtTime` | Commands | data_mutation | No | Remove all `LineData` entries at one frame |
| `AdvanceFrame` | Commands | navigation | No | Shift current visualization frame via `TimeController` |
| `ForEachKey` | Commands | meta | Conditional | Iterate a list of values, execute sub-commands per item |
| `SaveData` | Commands | persistence | No | Save a data object via `LoaderRegistry::trySave()` |
| `LoadData` | Commands | persistence | Yes | Load a data object via `LoaderRegistry::tryLoad()` |
| `SynthesizeData` | DataSynthesizer | data_creation | No | Generate data via `GeneratorRegistry` |

### Infrastructure

| Component | Location | Purpose |
|-----------|----------|---------|
| `CommandRegistry` | `src/Commands/Core/` | Singleton registry with `registerCommand()`, `isKnown()`, `create()`, `availableCommands()` |
| `CommandFactory` | `src/Commands/Core/` | Thin wrappers delegating to `CommandRegistry::instance()` |
| `register_core_commands()` | `src/Commands/` | Registers 10 built-in commands in the Commands library |
| `register_datasynthesizer_commands()` | `src/DataSynthesizer/` | Registers `SynthesizeData` |
| `register_transformsv2_commands()` | `src/TransformsV2/` | Placeholder for future TransformsV2 bridge commands |
| `CommandRecorder` | `src/Commands/Core/` | Records executed commands for replay; hook in `executeSequence()` |
| `CommandLog_Widget` | `src/WhiskerToolbox/CommandLog_Widget/` | Real-time command log with "Copy as JSON" export |
| `JsonPipelineRunner` | `src/DataManager/JsonPipeline/` | Headless load/transform/command/save pipeline from JSON |
| `DataManagerPipelineRunner` | `src/DataManagerPipelineRunner/` | CLI executable wrapping `runJsonPipelineFile()` |
| `GuidedPipelineEditor` | `src/WhiskerToolbox/TriageSession_Widget/` | Visual command-sequence builder (synced with raw JSON) |
| `MutationGuard` | `src/DataManager/Commands/` | Debug-only: warns when `DataManager` is mutated outside a command |
| `DataManagerSnapshot` | `src/DataManager/` | Lightweight state snapshot (type, entity count, content hash) for golden trace tests |
| `ParameterSchema` | `src/ParameterSchema/` | Compile-time parameter schema extraction from reflect-cpp structs |
| `AutoParamWidget` | `src/WhiskerToolbox/AutoParamWidget/` | Dynamic Qt form builder from `ParameterSchema` |
| `TriageSession` | `src/TriageSession/` | Mark/Commit/Recall state machine using command sequences |
| `SaverRegistry` | `src/DataManager/IO/core/` | `SaverInfo`, `AtomicWrite`, `getSupportedSaveFormats()` |
| `Validation` | `src/Commands/Core/` | `validateSequence()` — structural, type, and variable checks |
| `VariableSubstitution` | `src/Commands/Core/` | Two-pass `${variable}` substitution + `normalizeJsonNumbers()` |

### Test Coverage

- **Command unit tests**: 25+ test cases (factory, move, copy, interval, forEach, error handling)
- **CommandRecorder tests**: 19 test cases (record/clear, JSON serialization, executeSequence integration, MutationGuard)
- **CommandRegistry tests**: 10 test cases (registration, discovery, creation, all-commands-present check)
- **Validation tests**: 10+ test cases (structural, deserialization, variable resolution, type compatibility)
- **Variable substitution tests**: 10+ test cases (static/runtime variables, integer normalization)
- **SaveData/LoadData tests**: 22 test cases (factory, execution, undo, serialization, round-trip)
- **Saver fuzz tests**: 9 fuzz test files (CSV round-trip for all 6 types, CapnProto lines, OpenCV masks)
- **TriageSession tests**: State machine transitions, runtime variable population, integration
- **Golden trace tests**: CopyByTimeRange, MoveByTimeRange, AddInterval, multi-command sequences, replay determinism

## Dependency Graph (Remaining Work)

```
Completed Foundation (Phases 1, 2, 3, 3.5 infra, 7)
   │
   ├──► Phase 3.5 integration testing ([#288](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/288))
   │       Golden-trace / DataManagerSnapshot verification for recorded command sequences
   │
   ├──► Widget Command-ification (ongoing, on-demand)
   │       [#289](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/289)–[#292](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/292)
   │
   ├──► Phase 4: Action Journal
   │       Depends on: [#288](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/288) (Phase 3.5 integration testing)
   │       Generalizes recorder into persistent timestamped log
   │
   └──► Phase 5: Undo/Redo
           Independent of other phases
           MoveByTimeRange already supports undo; needs CommandStack
```

**Parallelizable:** [#288](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/288), Phase 5, and widget command-ification can proceed independently.
Phase 4 depends on #288.

Headless batch execution and interactive sequence editing are **complete** — see
[JSON Pipeline Runner](../DataManager/json_pipeline_runner.qmd) and
[TriageSession Widget](../ui/TriageSession_Widget/index.qmd).

---

## Completed Phases (Summary)

### Phase 1 — Command Foundation (Complete)

All 14 steps complete. Delivered: core types (`CommandResult`, `CommandContext`, `CommandDescriptor`, `ICommand`), execution engine (two-pass variable substitution, `executeSequence()` with stop-on-error), query helpers (`getEntityIdsInRange()`), 4 initial commands (`MoveByTimeRange`, `CopyByTimeRange`, `AddInterval`, `ForEachKey`), validation (`validateSequence()`), GUI verb audit (on-demand strategy), `ParameterSchema` as standalone library, `CommandInfo` introspection, `CommandRecorder` + `MutationGuard`, `DataManagerSnapshot` + golden trace test pattern.

**Known pitfall (resolved):** `rfl::Generic` stores integers as `double`. Fixed via `normalizeJsonNumbers()`.

See the [design document](index.qmd) for architecture details.

### Phase 3 — Persistence Commands & Save Registry (Complete)

All steps complete. Delivered: `SaverInfo` metadata + `AtomicWrite` utility, 8 format savers (CSV ×6 data types, CapnProto LineData, OpenCV MaskData), all fuzz-tested. `SaveData` command (not undoable) and `LoadData` command (undoable via `deleteData()`).

See [SaverInfo & AtomicWrite](../DataManager/IO/saver_infrastructure.qmd), [SaveData](save_data.qmd), [LoadData](load_data.qmd).

### Phase 7 — Command Registration API (Complete)

Replaced the hardcoded if-else chain in `CommandFactory` with `CommandRegistry` singleton + explicit dispatcher pattern. All exit criteria met:

- `CommandFactory.cpp` contains zero if-else branches; delegates to `CommandRegistry::instance()`
- `register_core_commands()` registers all 10 built-in Commands-library commands
- Called from `MainWindow` constructor (dedicated `register_all_commands.cpp` deferred until domain libraries contribute commands)
- Reusable `tests/shared/RegisterCommandsListener.cpp` Catch2 listener for test setup
- `CommandRegistry.test.cpp` verifies all commands registered (10 test cases)
- No `--whole-archive` flags needed for Commands

**Why Explicit Dispatcher over RAII:** Commands chose a different registration pattern than TransformsV2/DataSynthesizer (RAII + `--whole-archive`). The explicit dispatcher avoids silent registration failures, eliminates platform-specific `--whole-archive` linker flags, gives tests precise control over available commands, and works cleanly across shared library boundaries. See the [design document](index.qmd) for the detailed comparison table.

**Next use:** When domain libraries (TransformsV2, MLCore) contribute commands, each defines a `register_*_commands()` function and the central dispatcher gains one line. See [Ownership & Registration Best Practices](../../inter_widget_communication_roadmap.md#ownership--registration-best-practices) for the full pattern.

---

## Phase 2 — Triage Session (Complete)

**Goal:** Mark/Commit/Recall workflow using command sequences.

**Delivered:** TriageSession core (state machine, `commit()` with runtime variables), TriageSessionState (EditorState subclass), TriageSessionWidget (UI), unit tests, AutoParamWidget extraction, Guided Pipeline Editor.

---

## Phase 3.5 — Command Recording (Nearly Complete)

**Goal:** Wire `CommandRecorder` into the running application so GUI actions produce
exportable `CommandSequenceDescriptor` JSON, enabling semi-automated golden trace test
generation.

**Completed (3.5.1–3.5.3):**

- **Centralized Recorder:** `CommandContext` has `CommandRecorder* recorder` field.
  `executeSequence()` falls back to `ctx.recorder`. `MainWindow` owns a `CommandRecorder`
  and exposes `commandRecorder()` getter.
- **Route Widgets:** DataSynthesizer Generate, SaveData call sites, and TriageSession
  `commit()` route through `executeSequence()` with the shared recorder.
- **Command Log UI:** `CommandLog_Widget` displays recorded commands in real-time with
  "Copy as JSON" and "Clear". Accessible via Modules → Command Log.

**Remaining:** Integration and golden-trace testing — [#288](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/288)

---

## Widget Command-ification (Ongoing)

**Goal:** Route all `DataManager` mutations through commands. Audited on-demand per widget.

**Strategy:** See [GUI Verb Audit](gui_verb_audit.qmd) for the full audit process, widget
tables, and command designs.

### Definition of Done

A widget is fully command-ified when:

1. **Zero direct `DataManager` mutations** — all `setData()`, `deleteData()`, etc. go through
   `createCommand()` + `execute()`.
2. **Zero MutationGuard warnings** — exercising the widget in a debug build produces no
   console warnings.
3. **Golden trace test exists** — at least one Catch2 test replays a recorded command
   sequence and asserts the final `DataManagerSnapshot`.

### Audited Widgets

| Widget | Verbs | Covered | New Cmds Needed | Golden Trace |
|--------|-------|---------|-----------------|--------------|
| DataManager_Widget | 3 | 0 | 2 ([#289](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/289)) | Not yet |
| DataInspector_Widget | ~30 | ~10 | ~12 ([#291](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/291), [#292](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/292)) | Not yet |

### Commands in progress

**Wave 1 — Core CRUD**

- `CreateData`, `DeleteData` + `DataManager_Widget` routing — [#289](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/289)
- `AddEvent`, `RemoveEvent` + `DigitalEventSeriesInspector` routing — [#290](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/290)

**Wave 2 — Entity operations:** `DeleteByEntityIds`, `RemoveInterval`, `ModifyInterval` — [#291](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/291)

**Wave 3 — Group operations:** `AssignToGroup`, `RemoveFromGroup` — [#292](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/292)

Param struct designs: [GUI Verb Audit — New Commands Identified](gui_verb_audit.qmd#new-commands-identified).

---

## Phase 4 — Action Journal Integration

**Goal:** Commands auto-record to journal; journal can replay command entries.

**Depends on:** [#288](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/288) (Phase 3.5 integration testing)

Generalizes the `CommandRecorder` into a persistent, timestamped, filterable log with
workspace integration. The `executeSequence()` hook from Step 1.13 is reused — the change
is swapping `CommandRecorder*` for `ActionJournal*` with persistence and metadata.

### Step 4.1 — Journal Hook in executeSequence

- [ ] Generalize the `CommandRecorder*` parameter into `ActionJournal*`
- [ ] On successful command execution, record `ActionEntry` with timestamp, command
  name/description, serialized parameters, source widget

### Step 4.2 — Journal Replay

- [ ] Deserialize `ActionEntry::payload_json` via `createCommand()` + `execute()` for replay
- [ ] Journal export: filter out undone entries, produce clean `CommandSequenceDescriptor` JSON

### Step 4.3 — WorkspaceManager Integration

- [ ] Connect journal recording to existing `WorkspaceManager` provenance tracking

---

## Phase 5 — Undo/Redo

**Goal:** CommandStack, EditorState memento undo, inverse-command undo for data mutations.

**Depends on:** Phase 1 (done)

### Step 5.1 — CommandStack

- [ ] `CommandStack` class: push executed commands, undo/redo with `CommandContext`
- [ ] Clean state tracking: `markClean()` / `isClean()` for save-state awareness
- [ ] Redo stack cleared on new command push

See [CommandStack](index.qmd#commandstack) in the design document.

### Step 5.2 — WidgetStateChangeCommand

- [ ] Generic memento-based command for any `EditorState`
- [ ] Captures before/after JSON snapshots
- [ ] `mergeWith()` for coalescing rapid changes to the same widget

### Step 5.3 — CommandSequenceCommand

- [ ] Wraps `vector<unique_ptr<ICommand>>` for macro undo (e.g., triage commits)
- [ ] `isUndoable()` returns true if any child is undoable
- [ ] `undo()` reverses children in reverse order, skipping non-undoable ones

### Step 5.4 — MoveByTimeRange Undo Verification

- [ ] Integration test: move → undo → verify original state restored
  (`MoveByTimeRange` already reports `isUndoable() = true`)

### Step 5.5 — UI Integration

- [ ] Edit → Undo / Redo menu items
- [ ] Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Shift+Z keyboard shortcuts
- [ ] Integration with dirty tracking (`EditorState::isDirty()`, `WorkspaceManager`)

---

## Batch Execution & Sequence Editing (Complete)

The original "Phase 6" plan assumed separate CLI, macro-recording, and standalone sequence-editor
deliverables. These are now covered by existing components:

| Original plan | Delivered by |
|---------------|--------------|
| Headless CLI executor | `DataManagerPipelineRunner` + `JsonPipelineRunner` — see [JSON Pipeline Runner](../DataManager/json_pipeline_runner.qmd) |
| Macro / session recording | `CommandRecorder` + `CommandLog_Widget` ("Copy as JSON") — see [Command Log Widget](command_log_widget.qmd) |
| Standalone sequence editor | `TriageSession_Widget` guided editor + raw JSON — see [TriageSession Widget](../ui/TriageSession_Widget/index.qmd) |

No further work is planned for a generic `CommandSequenceWidget` or `ConfigExportToolbar`.

---

## Relationship to State Management Roadmap

This roadmap replaces Phases 4–6 of the
[State Management Roadmap](../../STATE_MANAGEMENT_ROADMAP.md) with a more comprehensive
command-first architecture. Remaining ideas carried forward: Action Journal, CommandStack,
memento-based EditorState undo, command merging, and incremental adoption.

## See Also

- [Command Architecture Design Document](index.qmd) — full architecture, types, and code examples
- [GUI Verb Audit](gui_verb_audit.qmd) — widget audit tables and new command designs
- [Inter-Widget Communication Roadmap](../../inter_widget_communication_roadmap.md) — ContextActions, OperationContext, cross-roadmap sequence
- [Tensor Transforms Roadmap](../../tensor_transforms_roadmap.md) — PCA, t-SNE, scatter integration
- [Data Manager](../DataManager/data_manager.qmd) — core data management documentation
